title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama. Chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers. Same surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package offering Ollama LLM, embedder, and retriever components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for any Ollama model. Clone of ChatGPT interface with folders, prompts, and RAG.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama. Fluent builder API, streaming, and Android compatibility.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem wrapping the Ollama REST API. Supports generate, chat, embed, pull, and list.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI that wraps Ollama with chat history, syntax highlighting, and keybindings.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Turn any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot-style code-completion service for VS Code.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaEmbedder pipelines.

title: ollama-curl
summary: Minimal Bash library exposing ollama() function using curl—no external deps for CI scripts.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that brings any Ollama model into a server with slash commands and thread support.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that lets teams chat with local Ollama models via mentions or DMs.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Official compose stacks including CPU, NVIDIA, and AMD ROCm variants plus WebUI sidecars.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG example using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store + Streamlit UI.

title: ollama-nest
summary: NestJS REST & WebSocket example showing how to serve Ollama chat completions at scale.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing strongly-typed async client for the Ollama API.

title: ollama-distroless
summary: Distroless container images for Ollama reducing attack surface and image size (~50 MB).

title: ollama-model-mirror
summary: Tool to cache and mirror Ollama models in private registries or air-gapped environments.
